versionName.description: The name of the annotation store version.

annotationFields.description: The annotation schema generated by the parsed annotation data.

numVersions.description: An integer indicating how many versions of an annotation store exist.

storeId.description: The store ID for annotation store version.

status.description: The status of an annotation store version.

versionArn.description: The Arn for the annotation store.

name.description: The name of the annotation store.

versionName.description: The name given to an annotation store version to distinguish it from others.

description.description: The description for an annotation store version.

creationTime.description: The time stamp for when an annotation store version was created.

updateTime.description: The time stamp for when an annotation store version was updated.

tags.description: Any tags associated with an annotation store version.

versionOptions.description: The options for an annotation store version.

statusMessage.description: The status of an annotation store version.

versionSizeBytes.description: The size of the annotation store version in Bytes.

statusMessage.description: The status message for a read set. It provides more detail as to why the read set has a status.

creationType.description: The creation type of the read set.

etag.description: The entity tag (ETag) is a hash of the object meant to represent its semantic content.

cacheId.description: The run cache associated with the run.

cacheBehavior.description: The run cache behavior for the run.

engineVersion.description: The actual Nextflow engine version that Amazon Web Services HealthOmics used for the run. The other workflow definition languages don't provide a value for this field.

storageCapacity.description: The run's storage capacity in gibibytes. For dynamic storage, after the run has completed, this value is the maximum amount of storage used during the run.

accelerators.description: The computational accelerator used to run the workflow.

uuid.description: The universally unique identifier for a run.

workflowUuid.description: The universally unique identifier (UUID) value for the workflow.

arn.description: Unique resource identifier for the run cache.

cacheBehavior.description: The default cache behavior for runs using this cache.

cacheS3Uri.description: The S3 URI where the cache data is stored.

creationTime.description: Creation time of the run cache (an ISO 8601 formatted string).

tags.description: The tags associated with the run cache.

maxCpus.description: The group's maximum number of CPUs to use.

maxRuns.description: The maximum number of concurrent runs for the group.

maxDuration.description: The group's maximum run time in minutes.

maxGpus.description: The maximum GPUs that can be used by a run group.

cacheHit.description: Set to true if Amazon Web Services HealthOmics found a matching entry in the run cache for this task.

cacheS3Uri.description: The S3 URI of the cache location.

gpus.description: The number of Graphics Processing Units (GPU) specified in the task.

imageDetails.description: Details about the container image that this task uses.

s3AccessPointArn.description: The S3 access point ARN that has the access policy.

storeId.description: The Amazon Web Services-generated Sequence Store or Reference Store ID.

storeType.description: The type of store associated with the access point.

updateTime.description: The time when the policy was last updated.

s3AccessPolicy.description: The current resource policy that controls S3 access on the store.

fallbackLocation.description: An S3 location that is used to store files that have failed a direct upload.

s3Access.description: The S3 metadata of a sequence store, including the ARN and S3 URI of the S3 bucket.

statusMessage.description: The status message of the sequence store.

propagatedSetLevelTags.description: The tags keys to propagate to the S3 objects associated with read sets in the sequence store.

updateTime.description: The last-updated time of the sequence store.

share.description: A resource share details object. The object includes the status, the resourceArn, and ownerId.

annotationFields.description: The annotation schema generated by the parsed annotation data.

main.description: The path of the main definition file for the workflow.

storageCapacity.description: The default static storage capacity (in gibibytes) for runs that use this workflow or workflow version.

accelerators.description: The computational accelerator specified to run the workflow.

storageType.description: The default storage type for runs using this workflow.

uuid.description: The universally unique identifier (UUID) value for this workflow.

containerRegistryMap.description: The registry map that this workflow is using.

readme.description: The README content for the workflow, providing documentation and usage information.

definitionRepositoryDetails.description: Details about the source code repository that hosts the workflow definition files.

readmePath.description: The path to the workflow README markdown file within the repository. This file provides documentation and usage information for the workflow. If not specified, the README.md file from the root directory of the repository will be used.

engine.description: The workflow engine for this workflow version.

main.description: The path of the main definition file for the workflow.

parameterTemplate.description: The parameter template for the workflow version.

storageType.description: The default storage type for the run.

storageCapacity.description: The default run storage capacity for static storage.

uuid.description: The universally unique identifier (UUID) value for this workflow version

workflowBucketOwnerId.description: Amazon Web Services Id of the owner of the bucket.

containerRegistryMap.description: The registry map that this workflow version uses.

readme.description: The README content for the workflow version, providing documentation and usage information specific to this version.

definitionRepositoryDetails.description: Details about the source code repository that hosts the workflow version definition files.

readmePath.description: The path to the workflow version README markdown file within the repository. This file provides documentation and usage information for the workflow. If not specified, the README.md file from the root directory of the repository will be used.

annotationStoreVersions.description: Lists all versions of an annotation store.
